–(The name of various regions, and of several men. The word signifies 
highlands, and is applied in its compounds to various highland districts of Syria)

–2. A region north of Canaan1Ch 2:23
–3. Son of ShemGe 10:22,23;1Ch 1:17
–4. Son of KemuelGe 22:21
–5. Son of Shamer1Ch 7:34
